name: TELUS Agriculture & Consumer Goods API
what_it_does: TELUS Agriculture & Consumer Goods REST API for farm management software, precision agriculture, and food supply chain traceability. Enables AI agents to manage crop production records and field activity tracking for agronomic compliance documentation, handle farm financial management and grain marketing for commodity risk management, access soil health and fertility management data for precision nutrient management, retrieve weather and climate data integration for agricultural risk assessment, manage livestock production records and animal health tracking for livestock compliance, handle food supply chain traceability from farm to retail for food safety compliance, access sustainability and carbon footprint reporting for agricultural ESG programs, retrieve equipment telematics and farm machinery management for precision operations, manage agronomist advisory and recommendation tracking for crop science workflow, and integrate TELUS Agriculture data with cooperative, lender, and crop insurance platforms.
use_cases: Recording crop production from farm management agents
Tracking food supply chain from traceability agents
Managing livestock records from animal health agents
Reporting sustainability data from agricultural ESG agents
not_for: Non-agricultural industries without farm management context
Small farms without digital farm management adoption
US-only operations without Canadian agriculture focus
best_when: A farm, agricultural cooperative, or food company in Canada or the US using TELUS Agriculture (Decisive Farming, Land.db, Agrian) wants AI agents to automate farm records, precision agriculture, traceability, and supply chain compliance.
avoid_when: PRODUCT PORTFOLIO COMPLEXITY: TELUS Agriculture is assembled from multiple acquisitions (Decisive Farming, Land.db, Agrian, Proagrica) with different APIs — verify which platform API applies to your use case. Canadian Privacy Act and PIPEDA apply to Canadian farm data; automated data sharing requires farmer consent under AAFC Farm Data Principles. Crop protection product label compliance — automated pesticide application recommendations must respect Canadian PMRA label restrictions and buffer zones.

auth.notes: TELUS Agriculture uses OAuth 2.0 across platforms. API access via TELUS Agriculture partner program. No public webhooks. REST API with JSON. Burnaby, British Columbia HQ (TELUS). Public (T TSX/NYSE). TELUS Agriculture assembled from acquisitions: Decisive Farming (2020), Land.db (2017), Agrian (2020), Proagrica (2021). 100,000+ farms globally. Canadian and North American agriculture focus. Competes with Trimble Agriculture, CNH AFS, and Bushel for farm management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No public free tier — subscription and enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-acre or per-farm subscription; enterprise supply chain pricing
pricing.notes: Burnaby, BC, Canada. TELUS (T TSX/NYSE). TELUS Agriculture assembled from multiple agtech acquisitions 2017-2021. 100,000+ farms. Canadian and North American focus. Competes with Trimble and John Deere Operations Center for farm management.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented per partner integration

known_agent_gotchas: MULTI-PLATFORM COMPLEXITY: TELUS Agriculture is assembled from multiple acquisitions (Decisive Farming, Land.db, Agrian, Proagrica) with different API architectures; identify which sub-platform you need before integration planning

Canadian PIPEDA and AAFC Farm Data Principles — Canadian farm data is protected under PIPEDA and AAFC farmer data ownership principles; automated data export or third-party sharing requires farmer consent

PMRA pesticide label compliance — automated crop protection product recommendations must respect Canadian PMRA label restrictions, buffer zones, and re-entry intervals; label violations create regulatory liability
No webhooks — farm activity event notification requires polling; no native push for planting, application, or harvest events
Canadian metric standards — TELUS Agriculture uses metric units (hectares, kilograms) for Canadian operations; US integrations require unit conversion for acres, pounds, bushels
Post-acquisition API consolidation — TELUS Agriculture API may be mid-consolidation across acquired platforms; some API endpoints may be deprecated or redirected as platforms merge
agent_readiness.security_notes: Farm management and food supply chain. SOC2. OAuth2. CA/US. Farm records and agricultural supply chain data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Agricultural platform. SOC2. OAuth2. CA/US. Farm and supply chain data.
